requirement_topic.en: JSMO Scope Screening and IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: JSMO适用范围筛查及IEC 62619 / IEC 62933证据
requirement_topic.zht: JSMO適用範圍篩查及IEC 62619 / IEC 62933證據

summary.en: Jordan's JSMO is the national standards body and provides standards search, conformity, and pre-verification service entry points. For lithium BESS, public sources should be treated as a scope-screening gate rather than proof of one universal whole-system certificate. Project owners, lenders, insurers, EPCs, or reviewers may request IEC 62619 safety evidence for industrial lithium cells and batteries and IEC 62933 evidence for electrical energy storage systems.
summary.zh: 约旦JSMO是国家标准机构，并提供标准检索、符合性和预先核验证服务入口。对锂电BESS而言，公开资料应被视为适用范围筛查关口，而不是存在单一通用整机证书的证明。项目业主、贷款方、保险方、EPC或审查方可能要求工业用锂电芯和电池的IEC 62619安全证据，以及电能储能系统的IEC 62933证据。
summary.zht: 約旦JSMO是國家標準機構，並提供標準檢索、符合性和預先核驗證服務入口。對鋰電BESS而言，公開資料應被視為適用範圍篩查關口，而不是存在單一通用整機證書的證明。項目業主、貸款方、保險方、EPC或審查方可能要求工業用鋰電芯和電池的IEC 62619安全證據，以及電能儲能系統的IEC 62933證據。

standards_or_laws: Jordan Standards and Metrology Organization standards and conformity routes
IEC 62933-5-2 where system-safety evidence is requested

summary.en: China BESS files commonly include GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 battery evidence, plus GB/T 36558-2023 system evidence. These documents can support technical due diligence but do not by themselves prove JSMO acceptance, IEC-numbered certification, or project acceptance in Jordan.
summary.zh: 中国BESS文件通常包括GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023电池证据，以及GB/T 36558-2023系统证据。这些文件可支持技术尽调，但本身不能证明JSMO接受、IEC编号认证或约旦项目接受。
summary.zht: 中國BESS文件通常包括GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023電池證據，以及GB/T 36558-2023系統證據。這些文件可支持技術盡調，但本身不能證明JSMO接受、IEC編號認證或約旦項目接受。

gap.en: Confirm the exact Jordan route by HS code, product configuration, bill of materials, contract, and project specification. Prepare English technical files, accredited-lab reports, certificates where available, and a clause matrix showing where China GB / GB/T evidence maps to IEC 62619 and the relevant IEC 62933 parts.
gap.zh: 应按HS编码、产品配置、物料清单、合同和项目规范确认具体约旦路径。准备英文技术文件、认可实验室报告、可取得的证书，以及显示中国GB/GB/T证据如何映射至IEC 62619和相关IEC 62933分册的条款矩阵。
gap.zht: 應按HS編碼、產品配置、物料清單、合約和項目規範確認具體約旦路徑。準備英文技術文件、認可實驗室報告、可取得的證書，以及顯示中國GB／GB/T證據如何映射至IEC 62619和相關IEC 62933分冊的條款矩陣。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only where a Jordan standard, technical regulation, customs route, conformity route, tender, contract, utility, insurer, lender, or authority calls up the exact product, component, standard, or evidence package
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for covered China domestic electric-energy-storage lithium-ion cells and batteries; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 are recommended unless incorporated by regulation, project, or contract

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat JSMO as a scope-confirmation and standards-evidence gate. Do not assume China GB reports are accepted in Jordan without an explicit JSMO, project, or reviewer decision.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将JSMO作为适用范围确认和标准证据关口。未取得JSMO、项目方或审查方明确结论前，不应假定中国GB报告在约旦被接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將JSMO作為適用範圍確認和標準證據關口。未取得JSMO、項目方或審查方明確結論前，不應假定中國GB報告在約旦被接受。
